## Type

<!-- Check all that apply -->

- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `refactor` — code change that is not a fix or feature
- [ ] `chore` — build, CI, dependencies

## Testing

<!-- How did you verify this works? -->

- [ ] `go build ./...` passes
- [ ] Manually tested in terminal (TUI mode)
- [ ] Manually tested with `--json` / `--markdown` / piped output

## Checklist

- [ ] PR title follows [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) (`feat: ...`, `fix: ...`, etc.)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]` (for `feat` / `fix` changes)
- [ ] No unrelated changes included
